title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 22
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two family members choosing a present for Dad.
items.audio_script: Man: Did you choose anything for Dad's birthday? You were thinking about a tie when we spoke yesterday. || Woman: I looked at that, and nearly chose a watch, but he wants to learn to make some new dinners. [1]I bought him a cookbook in the end[/1].. || Man: That sounds like a better choice. It is useful as well as thoughtful, so I am sure they will like it. || Woman: I hope so. I kept the receipt just in case, and I will wrap it carefully this evening after dinner.
items.question: What did the speaker buy for Dad?
items.explanation: The speaker bought a cookbook for Dad.

items.context: You hear two students preparing for a nature walk.
items.audio_script: Girl: Have you packed for the nature walk on Friday yet? I put a notebook in my bag because I thought that was what we needed. || Boy: That was mentioned earlier, but we are going to look for birds near the lake. [2]The teacher says each pair should bring binoculars[/2].. || Girl: I am glad I checked. I nearly left my bag by the door. Do I need a camera as well? || Boy: No, that is not necessary. Put the new item in tonight and check the message once more before you leave in the morning.
items.question: What should they bring?

items.context: You hear two friends planning Saturday morning.
items.audio_script: Boy: Are we still going to visit the market this weekend? I told my family I would be out this afternoon. || Girl: That was our first plan, but the market is cancelled and the ice rink is fully booked. We also thought about whether to go ice-skating. || Boy: So what have we decided? I need to tell my brother soon. || Girl: [3]We are going to the science museum instead[/3].. I will check the times online tonight and send you a message before we meet. || Boy: Great. That sounds easier than the other ideas.
items.question: What are they going to do on Saturday?
items.explanation: They decide to visit the science museum.

items.context: You hear two people talking about a bus journey.
items.audio_script: Woman: I need to check the time for the bus to Oxford. I wrote down quarter past nine, but I am not sure it is correct. || Man: It changed this morning because there has been a timetable change since yesterday. [4]The bus leaves at quarter to ten now[/4]., and we should arrive ten minutes earlier. || Woman: I am glad I asked. I would have arrived at the wrong time and waited there. || Man: I will send you a reminder later. Bring everything you need, because there may not be time to go home first.
items.question: What time does the bus leave?
items.explanation: The bus now leaves at quarter to ten.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about a camera.
items.audio_script: Man: How are you getting on with your camera? I heard there was a problem with it yesterday. || Woman: I first thought the battery needed replacing, and my brother wondered whether the lens was dirty. But someone checked it carefully this morning. [5]The memory card is completely full[/5].. || Man: Can it be repaired soon? You said you needed it for the family celebration tomorrow. || Woman: Yes, probably. Now we know what is wrong, it should be ready tomorrow. That is a relief, because I cannot manage without it.
items.question: What is wrong with the camera?

items.context: You hear two friends arranging a trip to the library.
items.audio_script: Girl: How are you getting to the new library? I thought you were planning to travel by bicycle. || Boy: I was, but my bike has a flat tyre and the bus takes much longer. I also considered going by bus. [6]I am going by tram instead[/6].. || Girl: That sounds sensible. What time do you expect to arrive there? || Boy: Just before eleven, if everything is on time. I checked the journey online, so I will message you when I leave home. || Girl: Good. I will wait near the entrance so you can find me easily.
items.question: How will the speaker get to the library?
items.explanation: The speaker will take the tram.

items.context: You hear two people choosing a drink at a café.
items.audio_script: Boy: Have you chosen what to order? The queue is moving quickly, and we need to leave soon. || Girl: I nearly chose a coffee, and I also looked at an orange juice, but I have already had coffee today and the juice is sold out. || Boy: So what are you going to have? I need to choose mine before we reach the counter. || Girl: [7]I will have a hot chocolate this time[/7].. It should be enough for me, and then we can find somewhere quiet to sit before we go.
items.question: What will the speaker drink?
items.explanation: The speaker chooses a hot chocolate.
